title: Utility Library
description: Stateless helper functions and static utility classes for async control, DOM/focus management, RxJS subscription cleanup, geometry hit-testing, color manipulation, and text parsing — used throughout ACoreX components.
imports: import { waitFor, delay, retryUntil, pollUntil, pollUntilAbortable, throttleAsync, debounceAsync, fallbackChain, AXHtmlUtil, AXDrawingUtil, AXColorUtil, AXUnsubscriber, AXAutoUnsubscriber, getWordBoundsAtPosition, AXPoint, AXBoundingClientRect } from '@acorex/core/utils';

hints.title: No module registration
hints.content: Import utilities directly from @acorex/core/utils. No providers or NgModule setup is required (except AXUnsubscriber in component providers).

hints.title: AXUnsubscriber per component
hints.content: AXUnsubscriber is not providedIn: 'root'. Add it to the component providers array, then inject(AXUnsubscriber) and pipe streams with takeUntilDestroy.

hints.title: Browser-only DOM helpers
hints.content: AXHtmlUtil and AXDrawingUtil access window, document, and element geometry. Guard with isBrowser() during SSR when calling outside components.

hints.title: waitFor in translation
hints.content: waitFor() is used internally by AXTranslationService.translateSync() to poll the translation cache while a scope loads.

types.title: waitFor
types.description: Synchronously polls peekFn until a value appears or timeoutMs elapses. Calls loadFn once when the first peek returns falsy.

methods.content: waitFor<T>(peekFn: () => T | null | undefined, loadFn: () => void, timeoutMs?: number): T | null

types.title: retryUntil
types.description: Retries an async function until success or max attempts.

methods.content: retryUntil<T>(fn: () => Promise<T>, attempts?: number, delayMs?: number): Promise<T>

types.title: pollUntil
types.description: Polls a boolean condition at intervalMs until true or timeout.

methods.content: pollUntil(condition: () => boolean, intervalMs?: number, timeoutMs?: number): Promise<boolean>

types.title: pollUntilAbortable
types.description: Like pollUntil but rejects when AbortSignal is aborted.

types.title: throttleAsync
types.description: Ensures only one in-flight call of an async function at a time.

types.title: debounceAsync
types.description: Debounces async function calls by waitMs.

types.title: fallbackChain
types.description: Runs async tasks in order until one succeeds.

types.title: AXHtmlUtil
types.description: Static DOM helpers for focus, RTL, scroll detection.

types.title: AXDrawingUtil
types.description: Geometry helpers for collision and point-in-rect tests.

methods.content: static collision(a: HTMLElement, b: HTMLElement): boolean
static isInElementBound(pos: AXPoint, element: HTMLElement): boolean
static isInRecPoint(pos: AXPoint, rect: AXBoundingClientRect): boolean

types.title: AXColorUtil
types.description: Color conversion and manipulation via tinycolor2 and tinygradient-es.

methods.content: static lighten / darken / brighten / saturate(hex, percentage?)

types.title: AXUnsubscriber
types.description: Injectable helper that completes observables on component destroy.

types.title: AXAutoUnsubscriber
types.description: Class decorator that auto-unsubscribes any property with a subscribe() method in ngOnDestroy.

types.title: getWordBoundsAtPosition
types.description: Finds start/end indices of the alphanumeric word at a cursor position.

methods.content: getWordBoundsAtPosition(str: string, position: number): { start: number; end: number }

types.title: AXPoint
types.description: 2D point { x, y } used by drawing utils and context menus.

content.data:
@acorex/core/utils is a tree-shakeable collection of pure functions and static classes — not Angular services. Import only what you need.

Categories:
• Execution — waitFor, delay, retryUntil, pollUntil, throttleAsync, debounceAsync, fallbackChain
• DOM — AXHtmlUtil (focus, RTL, scroll parents)
• Geometry — AXDrawingUtil, AXPoint
• Colors — AXColorUtil (tinycolor2 wrapper)
• RxJS lifecycle — AXUnsubscriber, AXAutoUnsubscriber
• Text — getWordBoundsAtPosition

ACoreX components use these utilities extensively: select-box and data-pager for subscriptions, menu for RTL/scroll, color-palette for color math, datetime-input for word selection.

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: Import the helpers you need and use them directly in component logic.

sections.title: waitFor — Sync Polling
sections.description: Block until a cached value is available.

sections.title: throttleAsync and debounceAsync
sections.description: Limit concurrent or rapid async calls.

sections.title: AXHtmlUtil — DOM Helpers
sections.description: Focus management, RTL detection, scrollable parents.

sections.title: AXColorUtil — Color Manipulation
sections.description: Convert, validate, mix, and generate colors.

sections.title: AXUnsubscriber — RxJS Cleanup
sections.description: The standard ACoreX pattern for automatic unsubscription.

sections.title: AXAutoUnsubscriber Decorator
sections.description: Legacy auto-cleanup for class properties with subscribe().

sections.title: getWordBoundsAtPosition
sections.description: Word selection for datetime-input and text editors.

sections.title: Real-World Usage in ACoreX
sections.description: Where utilities appear in the codebase.

content.data:
| Utility | Used in |
|---------|----------|
| AXUnsubscriber | select-box, autocomplete, data-table, calendar, form-field, scheduler |
| AXHtmlUtil.isRtl | menu, data-pager, editor, hero-section |
| AXHtmlUtil.getScrollableParents | menu-item (overlay positioning) |
| AXHtmlUtil.focusElement | MXInteractiveComponent, dialog |
| AXColorUtil | color-palette, theme-builder, qrcode |
| AXPoint | menu.service (context menu coordinates) |
| getWordBoundsAtPosition | datetime-input (segment editing) |
| waitFor | AXTranslationService.translateSync |

For new components, prefer inject(AXUnsubscriber) + takeUntilDestroy over manual Subscription arrays. Angular's takeUntilDestroyed() is also valid, but ACoreX components consistently use AXUnsubscriber.

| Need | Use |
|------|-----|
| Auto-unsubscribe RxJS in components | AXUnsubscriber + providers |
| Focus first input in dialog/panel | AXHtmlUtil.focusElement |
| RTL-aware layout | AXHtmlUtil.isRtl(element?) |
| Overlay scroll containment | AXHtmlUtil.getScrollableParents |
| Click/hit testing | AXDrawingUtil.isInElementBound |
| Element overlap | AXDrawingUtil.collision |
| Color picker / theme tokens | AXColorUtil.to, toString, mix |
| Retry flaky API | retryUntil |
| Wait for DOM/state | pollUntil |
| Debounced search | debounceAsync |
| Prevent duplicate saves | throttleAsync |
| Sync read from async cache | waitFor |
| Word-at-cursor selection | getWordBoundsAtPosition |
